lead.titleZh: 运动干预是慢性疼痛管理的重要基石：系统性伞形综述支持其普适有效性
lead.titleEn: Exercise as a Cornerstone for Chronic Pain Management: Umbrella Review Supports Universal Efficacy
lead.paragraphZh: 今日我们共 curated 了 13 篇文章，涵盖了 5 个专科方向。整体来看，今天的信号偏向观察性研究，证据等级最高的仍是系统综述。最高分来自骨科与肌骨领域的系统性伞形综述，强调了运动在不同慢性疼痛中的普适有效性，curatedScore 达 90 分，值得临床 PT 优先关注。
lead.paragraphEn: Today, we curated 13 articles across 5 specialties, with a general leaning towards observational studies. The highest level of evidence remains systematic reviews. The top score, 90, is an umbrella review from Orthopedics and Musculoskeletal, highlighting the broad efficacy of exercise across various chronic pain conditions, which merits prioritized attention for PT clinicians.

items.title: The effect of exercise on clinical pain: a systematic umbrella review and meta-meta-analysis
items.summary: An umbrella review and meta-meta-analysis synthesized evidence from 11 databases, confirming the consistent and significant analgesic effects of exercise across various pain conditions and exercise modalities.
items.curatedReason: 这是运动镇痛效应的最高级别证据。无论何种疼痛类型或运动方式，运动疗法作为一线干预的地位得到进一步巩固。在临床实践中，你应该坚定地向患者推荐运动治疗，并根据具体情况选择合适的运动方案。
items.titleZh: 运动对临床疼痛影响的系统性伞形综述和荟萃再分析
items.summaryZh: 一项伞形综述和荟萃再分析综合了 11 个数据库的证据，证实了运动对各种疼痛状况和运动模式均具有持续且显著的镇痛作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is the highest level of evidence for exercise-induced analgesia. The role of exercise therapy as a first-line intervention is further solidified, regardless of pain type or exercise modality. In clinical practice, you should confidently recommend exercise to patients, tailoring the program to their specific condition.
items.limitation: 伞形综述的局限性在于其纳入的原始研究异质性可能较高，且效应量可能因底层研究设计而异。
items.limitationEn: Limitations of umbrella reviews include potential high heterogeneity among included primary studies and variability in effect sizes due to underlying study designs.

items.title: Cost-effectiveness of Pilates compared with home-based exercises for people with chronic non-specific low back pain: a trial-based economic evaluation.
items.summary: A trial-based economic evaluation found Pilates to be cost-effective compared to home-based exercises for individuals with chronic non-specific low back pain in Brazil, showing similar outcomes from both healthcare and societal perspectives.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究表明，对于慢性非特异性腰痛，普拉提在医疗和社会成本效益上与居家锻炼相当。如果你在考虑不同运动方式的推荐，这提示普拉提是个经济上可行且有效的选项。
items.titleZh: 普拉提与居家锻炼治疗慢性非特异性腰痛的成本效益：一项基于试验的经济学评估
items.summaryZh: 一项基于试验的经济学评估显示，在巴西，普拉提与居家锻炼治疗慢性非特异性腰痛在医疗和社会成本效益方面相当。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study indicates that Pilates is comparable to home-based exercises in terms of healthcare and societal cost-effectiveness for chronic non-specific low back pain. If you're considering recommending different exercise modalities, this suggests Pilates is an economically viable and effective option.
items.limitation: 研究样本量相对较小，且仅针对巴西人群，外推至其他地区需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: The study's sample size is relatively small and it was conducted only in Brazil, so generalizing the findings to other populations should be done cautiously.

items.title: Distinct Patterns of Mobility Recovery After Stroke Using Routine Clinical Data
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study identified distinct mobility recovery trajectories in stroke patients using Activity Measure for Post-Acute Care (AM-PAC) Basic Mobility data from 700 patients, challenging the traditional average recovery patterns.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究利用真实世界数据识别了卒中后活动能力恢复的独特模式，表明个体恢复路径差异显著。这挑战了单一的平均恢复模式观念，对你进行预后评估和制定个性化康复方案有重要参考价值。
items.titleZh: 利用常规临床数据识别卒中后活动能力恢复的独特模式
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性队列研究利用来自 700 名卒中患者的 AM-PAC 基本活动能力数据，识别了卒中后活动能力恢复的独特轨迹模式，挑战了传统的平均恢复模式。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study uses real-world data to identify distinct patterns of mobility recovery after stroke, indicating significant individual variability in recovery trajectories. This challenges the notion of a single average recovery pattern and provides crucial insights for your prognostication and personalized rehabilitation planning.
items.limitation: 该研究是回顾性队列研究，且只纳入了单一大型医疗系统的数据，可能存在选择偏倚和外推性限制。
items.limitationEn: This was a retrospective cohort study and included data only from a single large health system, which may introduce selection bias and limit generalizability.

items.title: Online modulation of neural drive to lower motor neurons with high-definition transcranial alternating current stimulation (HD-tACS) | Journal of NeuroEngineering and Rehabilitation
items.summary: This research explored the online modulation of neural drive to lower motor neurons using high-definition transcranial alternating current stimulation (HD-tACS), demonstrating its potential for non-invasive brain stimulation.
items.curatedReason: 高清晰度经颅交流电刺激（HD-tACS）在线调节下运动神经元神经驱动的研究，为神经康复提供了潜在的新技术。虽然仍处于基础研究阶段，但你可以关注这类技术在未来临床应用中的转化潜力。
items.titleZh: 高清晰度经颅交流电刺激（HD-tACS）在线调节下运动神经元神经驱动
items.summaryZh: 这项研究探讨了使用高清晰度经颅交流电刺激（HD-tACS）在线调节下运动神经元神经驱动，展示了其在非侵入性脑刺激方面的潜力。
items.curatedReasonEn: This research on online modulation of neural drive to lower motor neurons with high-definition transcranial alternating current stimulation (HD-tACS) offers a potential new technology for neurorehabilitation. While still in foundational research, you can monitor the translational potential of such technologies for future clinical applications.
items.limitation: 本研究探索了方法学可行性，但临床转化前景和实际疗效仍需大规模临床试验验证。
items.limitationEn: This study explored methodological feasibility, but its clinical translation and actual efficacy require validation through large-scale clinical trials.

items.title: "If you don't sort out these problems, you end up building problems": a qualitative study exploring mouthcare at home with people with Parkinson's and their partners in care.
items.summary: A qualitative study explored the experiences of 13 people with Parkinson's and 7 care partners regarding mouthcare activities at home, identifying motor and non-motor barriers such as reduced dexterity, fatigue, and apathy.
items.curatedReason: 帕金森病患者在家进行口腔护理面临运动和非运动障碍，如精细动作受限、疲劳和冷漠。在制定康复计划时，除了关注步态和平衡，你还需要考虑这些日常自理活动中的隐形挑战，并可能需要跨专业转诊以提升患者的整体生活质量。
items.titleZh: “如果你不解决这些问题，最终会制造更多问题”：一项关于帕金森病患者及其照护伙伴家庭口腔护理的定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项定性研究探讨了13名帕金森病患者及其7名照护伙伴在家进行口腔护理的经历，发现了包括灵活性下降、疲劳和冷漠等运动及非运动障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: People with Parkinson's face motor and non-motor barriers to home mouthcare, including reduced dexterity, fatigue, and apathy. When developing rehabilitation plans, in addition to gait and balance, you need to consider these hidden challenges in daily self-care activities and may require interprofessional referrals to improve overall patient quality of life.
items.limitation: 定性研究结果的普遍适用性有限，主要反映特定受访者的主观体验。
items.limitationEn: The generalizability of qualitative research findings is limited, primarily reflecting the subjective experiences of specific interviewees.

items.title: and- see approach in a gluteal tendinopathy trial: a ...
items.summary: A qualitative follow-up study from 2021 explored the perspectives and experiences of people assigned to a 'wait-and-see' approach in a gluteal tendinopathy trial.
items.curatedReason: 这篇发表于 2021 年的研究，讨论的是一项关于臀肌肌腱病“等待观望”方法的定性随访研究，已较为陈旧。虽然定性研究提供了患者视角，但对当前临床实践的指导意义有限。
items.titleZh: 臀肌肌腱病试验中“等待观望”方法的患者视角和经验：一项定性随访研究
items.summaryZh: 一项 2021 年的定性随访研究探讨了臀肌肌腱病试验中被分配到“等待观望”方法的患者的观点和经验。
items.curatedReasonEn: This 2021 study on a qualitative follow-up of a 'wait-and-see' approach for gluteal tendinopathy is outdated. While qualitative research offers patient perspectives, its relevance to current clinical practice is limited.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性研究，样本量小，结果不具普遍性。
items.limitationEn: This qualitative study has a small sample size and its results are not generalizable.

items.title: Validity and reliability of remote administration of the one-leg stand, timed up and go and 30-second sit-to-stand via video call in patients with lumbar spinal stenosis awaiting decompression surgery | BMC Musculoskeletal Disorders
items.summary: A study validated the reliability of remote administration of the one-leg stand, timed up and go, and 30-second sit-to-stand tests via video call in patients with lumbar spinal stenosis, showing strong agreement with in-person assessments.
items.curatedReason: 远程评估工具在脊柱管狭窄患者中的有效性得到了验证。这意味着你可以更灵活地使用远程医疗技术，对等待手术的腰椎管狭窄患者进行跌倒风险和功能评估，提高患者的可及性。
items.titleZh: 视频通话远程实施单腿站立、计时起身行走和 30 秒坐站测试在腰椎管狭窄症患者中的有效性和可靠性
items.summaryZh: 一项研究验证了通过视频通话对腰椎管狭窄症患者进行单腿站立、计时起身行走和 30 秒坐站测试的有效性和可靠性，结果显示与现场评估具有高度一致性。
items.curatedReasonEn: The validity and reliability of remote assessment tools for lumbar spinal stenosis patients have been validated. This means you can more flexibly use telehealth technology to assess fall risk and function in patients awaiting decompression surgery for lumbar spinal stenosis, improving patient access.
items.limitation: 本研究的样本量和患者特征可能限制其外推性，且远程评估可能无法捕捉所有线下评估的细节。
items.limitationEn: The sample size and patient characteristics of this study may limit its generalizability, and remote assessments may not capture all the details of in-person evaluations.

items.title: Family-Based Group Intervention Revitalizes the Psychosocial Well-Being of Adolescents with Scoliosis Receiving Brace Treatment | Child and Adolescent Social Work Journal
items.summary: A study found that a family-based group intervention revitalized the psychosocial well-being of adolescents with scoliosis receiving brace treatment, supporting non-operative modality for preventing spinal curvature progression.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究证实了以家庭为基础的团体干预能有效改善接受支具治疗的青少年脊柱侧弯患者的社会心理健康。在临床实践中，你应该重视并推广这种家庭参与模式，因为它能提升治疗依从性和整体预后。
items.titleZh: 家庭团体干预改善接受支具治疗青少年脊柱侧弯患者的社会心理健康
items.summaryZh: 一项研究发现，家庭团体干预能改善接受支具治疗的青少年脊柱侧弯患者的社会心理健康，支持非手术方式预防脊柱弯曲进展。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study confirms that family-based group interventions effectively improve the psychosocial well-being of adolescents with scoliosis undergoing brace treatment. In clinical practice, you should prioritize and promote this family-involved model, as it can enhance treatment adherence and overall prognosis.
items.limitation: 本研究为观察性研究，可能存在选择偏倚和混杂因素，需要更严格的随机对照试验来进一步验证。
items.limitationEn: This observational study may be subject to selection bias and confounding factors, requiring more rigorous randomized controlled trials for further validation.

items.title: Stepwise surgical management of spasticity and dystonia in severe pediatric cerebral palsy: a case report involving selective dorsal rhizotomy, intrathecal baclofen therapy, and deep brain stimulation | Child's Nervous System
items.summary: A case report detailed the stepwise surgical management of spasticity and dystonia in severe pediatric cerebral palsy, involving selective dorsal rhizotomy, intrathecal baclofen therapy, and deep brain stimulation.
items.curatedReason: 这篇病例报告展示了对严重儿童脑瘫患者痉挛和肌张力障碍的阶梯式手术管理方法。对于物理治疗师而言，了解这些复杂的神经外科干预手段，有助于你更好地参与跨学科团队的病例管理，并制定术后康复计划。
items.titleZh: 严重儿童脑瘫患者痉挛和肌张力障碍的阶梯式手术管理：一例选择性脊神经后根切断术、鞘内巴氯芬治疗和深部脑刺激的病例报告
items.summaryZh: 一篇病例报告详细描述了对严重儿童脑瘫患者痉挛和肌张力障碍的阶梯式手术管理，包括选择性脊神经后根切断术、鞘内巴氯芬治疗和深部脑刺激。
items.curatedReasonEn: This case report showcases a stepwise surgical management approach for spasticity and dystonia in severe pediatric cerebral palsy patients. For physical therapists, understanding these complex neurosurgical interventions can help you better participate in interdisciplinary team case management and develop postoperative rehabilitation plans.
items.limitation: 本研究为病例报告，其发现不具普遍性，仅作为临床经验的参考。
items.limitationEn: This is a case report, so its findings are not generalizable and serve only as a reference for clinical experience.

items.title: The NeuroWES project: lessons learned from comprehensive phenotyping and genetic analysis of neurodevelopmental disorders over a decade | Human Genetics
items.summary: The NeuroWES project summarized lessons learned from a decade of comprehensive phenotyping and genetic analysis of neurodevelopmental disorders, highlighting challenges in variant interpretation in heterogeneous cohorts.
items.curatedReason: “NeuroWES 项目”总结了十年间神经发育障碍综合表型分析和遗传分析的经验教训。对于物理治疗师而言，了解基因在神经发育障碍中的作用，有助于你更好地理解疾病的复杂性，但对直接康复干预的指导意义有限。
items.titleZh: NeuroWES 项目：十年神经发育障碍综合表型和遗传分析的经验教训
items.summaryZh: NeuroWES 项目总结了十年间神经发育障碍综合表型和遗传分析的经验教训，强调了在异质性队列中解读变异体的挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: The NeuroWES project summarizes lessons learned from a decade of comprehensive phenotyping and genetic analysis of neurodevelopmental disorders. For physical therapists, understanding the role of genetics in neurodevelopmental disorders helps you better grasp disease complexity, but its direct guidance for rehabilitation interventions is limited.
items.limitation: 本研究侧重于遗传学分析和表型描述，而非直接康复干预的疗效评估。
items.limitationEn: This study focuses on genetic analysis and phenotypic description, rather than directly evaluating the efficacy of rehabilitation interventions.

items.title: Early Childhood Educators’ Doings to Facilitate Children’s Participation in Play: A Scoping Review and Thematic Analysis of Research Literature | International Journal of Early Childhood
items.summary: A scoping review and thematic analysis explored early childhood educators' strategies to facilitate children's participation in play, emphasizing its role in quality education and care.
items.curatedReason: 虽然这项综述聚焦早期儿童教育，但它强调了游戏对儿童发展的重要性。你可以借鉴其理念，在与有发育障碍儿童的家庭沟通时，突出游戏在促进发展和参与中的关键作用，并指导家长如何通过游戏进行康复。
items.titleZh: 早期儿童教育者促进儿童参与游戏的方法：一项研究文献的范围综述和主题分析
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述和主题分析探讨了早期儿童教育者促进儿童参与游戏的方法，强调了其在优质教育和照护中的作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: Although this review focuses on early childhood education, it highlights the importance of play for child development. You can draw upon its insights when communicating with families of children with developmental disorders, emphasizing the critical role of play in promoting development and participation, and guiding parents on how to incorporate play into rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 本研究为范围综述，主要旨在描绘文献而非评估干预措施的有效性。
items.limitationEn: This scoping review primarily aims to map the literature rather than evaluate the effectiveness of interventions.

items.title: A Scoping Review of Methods for Extrapolating Costs and Effects in Economic Evaluations of Remote Monitoring | PharmacoEconomics - Open
items.summary: A scoping review identified methods for extrapolating costs and effects in economic evaluations of remote monitoring, highlighting challenges due to often insufficient methodological quality and lack of long-term data.
items.curatedReason: 远程监测的经济学评估在外推成本和效果方面存在方法学挑战和数据不足的问题。你可以关注这些不足如何影响远程康复服务的经济价值判断和政策制定，但不应将当前结果视为远程医疗经济效益的最终定论。
items.titleZh: 远程监测经济学评估中成本和效果外推方法的范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述识别了远程监测经济学评估中成本和效果外推的方法，强调了方法学质量不足和长期数据缺乏所带来的挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: Economic evaluations of remote monitoring face methodological challenges and data limitations in extrapolating costs and effects. You should monitor how these shortcomings impact the economic valuation and policy-making for remote rehabilitation services, but do not consider current results as the final word on the economic benefits of telehealth.
items.limitation: 本研究为方法学综述，未提供具体的临床干预效果数据。
items.limitationEn: This study is a methodological review and does not provide specific clinical intervention efficacy data.

items.title: Prediction of Exercise Intolerance in the Recovery Period After Cardiovascular Surgery Using Perioperative Clinical Parameters.
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study developed and validated a machine learning model using perioperative clinical parameters to predict reduced exercise capacity at 3 months post-cardiovascular surgery in 590 patients aged ≤75 years.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究开发并验证了一个预测心血管手术后运动不耐受的机器学习模型。在术后 3 个月，你可以利用出院时的临床参数进行早期风险识别，从而更早地介入康复，优化患者管理。
items.titleZh: 利用围手术期临床参数预测心血管手术后恢复期的运动不耐受
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性队列研究开发并验证了一个机器学习模型，该模型使用围手术期临床参数预测590名≤75岁心血管手术患者术后3个月的运动能力下降情况。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study developed and validated a machine learning model to predict exercise intolerance after cardiovascular surgery. You can use clinical parameters available at hospital discharge for early risk identification at 3 months post-op, enabling earlier rehabilitation intervention and optimizing patient management.
items.limitation: 这是一项单中心回顾性队列研究，模型的外推性和普遍适用性可能需要多中心前瞻性验证。
items.limitationEn: This was a single-center retrospective cohort study, and the generalizability and applicability of the model may require multi-center prospective validation.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Prediction of Exercise Intolerance in the Recovery Period After Cardiovascular Surgery Using Perioperative Clinical Parameters
